name: form
title: BTForm
description: Top-level form coordinator. Wraps a native <form> with a single `validation` prop (function form or per-field map) and provide keys (bt-form-values, bt-form-errors, bt-form-touched, bt-form-submitted, bt-form-set-field, bt-form-touch, bt-form-error-for, bt-form-state) that BT inputs subscribe to via their `name` prop — value, change handlers, blur, and error wire automatically. Errors gate on touched OR submitted; `submit` only fires when the form is valid; `invalid` fires with the full error map otherwise.

files.content:
<!--
  BTForm — top-level form coordinator. Mirrors what you'd write with a
  plain <form>, but adds:

    - A single `validator` prop (function OR per-field map) that runs once
      per render and produces a `field → error` map.
    - Provide keys that BT input components subscribe to via their `name`
      prop — value, change handlers, blur, and error wire automatically.
    - `submit-success` only fires when the form is valid.
    - Errors gated on `touched` OR `submitted` so untouched fields stay
      clean until the user attempts submit.

  Provide keys (mirrors the BTFormField convention):
    'bt-form-values'      → Reactive<T> values object
    'bt-form-errors'      → ComputedRef<Partial<Record<keyof T,string|null>>>
    'bt-form-touched'     → Reactive<Partial<Record<keyof T,boolean>>>
    'bt-form-submitted'   → Ref<boolean>
    'bt-form-set-field'   → (name, value) => void
    'bt-form-touch'       → (name) => void
    'bt-form-error-for'   → (name) => string | null (gated)
    'bt-form-state'       → full BTFormState reactive snapshot

  Usage:
    <BTForm
      :initial-values="{ title: '', email: '' }"
      :validator="{
        title: (v) => v.trim() ? null : 'Title required',
        email: (v) => /.+@.+/.test(v) ? null : 'Invalid email',
      }"
      @submit-success="handleSubmit"
    >
      <BTInput name="title" label="Title" required />
      <BTInput name="email" label="Email" type="email" required />
      <BTButton type="submit" label="Submit" />
    </BTForm>
-->
<script setup lang="ts" generic="T extends Record<string, unknown>">
import { reactive, ref, computed, provide, toRaw } from 'vue';
import type {
  BTFormFieldValidator,
  BTFormProps,
  BTFormState,
  BTFormStatus,
  BTFormValidator,
} from './BTForm.types';

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<BTFormProps<T>>(), {
  noValidate: true,
});

const emit = defineEmits<{
  submit: [values: T];
  invalid: [errors: Partial<Record<keyof T, string | null>>];
  reset: [];
}>();

// Reactive state mirrors React useState shape.
const values = reactive({ ...props.initialValues }) as T;
const touched = reactive({}) as Partial<Record<keyof T, boolean>>;
const submitted = ref(false);
const status = ref<BTFormStatus>('idle');

function runValidator(
  validator: BTFormValidator<T> | undefined,
  v: T,
): Partial<Record<keyof T, string | null>> {
  if (!validator) return {};
  if (typeof validator === 'function') {
    const raw = validator(v) ?? {};
    const out: Partial<Record<keyof T, string | null>> = {};
    for (const k of Object.keys(raw) as Array<keyof T>) {
      const val = raw[k];
      out[k] = val == null ? null : val;
    }
    return out;
  }
  const out: Partial<Record<keyof T, string | null>> = {};
  for (const k of Object.keys(v) as Array<keyof T>) {
    const fn = (validator as Record<string, BTFormFieldValidator<unknown, T>>)[
      k as string
    ];
    if (!fn) continue;
    const result = fn(v[k], v);
    out[k] = result == null ? null : result;
  }
  return out;
}

const errors = computed(() => runValidator(props.validation, values));
const isValid = computed(() =>
  Object.values(errors.value).every((e) => !e),
);

function errorFor(name: keyof T): string | null {
  if (submitted.value || touched[name]) {
    return errors.value[name] ?? null;
  }
  return null;
}

function setField<K extends keyof T>(name: K, value: T[K]) {
  (values as Record<keyof T, unknown>)[name] = value;
}

function touch(name: keyof T) {
  touched[name] = true;
}

function reset() {
  // Reset values to initial — re-assign each key (preserve reactive identity).
  const init = props.initialValues;
  for (const k of Object.keys(values) as Array<keyof T>) {
    delete (values as Record<keyof T, unknown>)[k];
  }
  for (const k of Object.keys(init) as Array<keyof T>) {
    (values as Record<keyof T, unknown>)[k] = init[k];
  }
  for (const k of Object.keys(touched) as Array<keyof T>) {
    delete touched[k];
  }
  submitted.value = false;
  status.value = 'idle';
  emit('reset');
}

function validate() {
  return errors.value;
}

async function handleSubmit(e: Event) {
  e.preventDefault();
  submitted.value = true;
  if (!isValid.value) {
    status.value = 'submitted-invalid';
    emit('invalid', errors.value);
    return;
  }
  try {
    // Pass a plain (non-reactive) snapshot to consumers.
    const snapshot = { ...toRaw(values) } as T;
    emit('submit', snapshot);
    status.value = 'submitted-success';
  } catch {
    status.value = 'submitted-invalid';
  }
}

function handleReset(e: Event) {
  e.preventDefault();
  reset();
}

// Provide individual keys so consumers can inject only what they need.
provide('bt-form-values', values);
provide('bt-form-errors', errors);
provide('bt-form-touched', touched);
provide('bt-form-submitted', submitted);
provide('bt-form-set-field', setField);
provide('bt-form-touch', touch);
provide('bt-form-error-for', errorFor);

// Also provide a full state for advanced consumers + render-slot scope.
const formState = computed<BTFormState<T>>(() => ({
  values,
  errors: errors.value,
  touched,
  submitted: submitted.value,
  status: status.value,
  isValid: isValid.value,
  errorFor,
  setField,
  touch,
  reset,
  validate,
}));
provide('bt-form-state', formState);

defineExpose({
  values,
  errors,
  isValid,
  reset,
  validate,
});
</script>

<template>
  <form
    :id="id"
    :class="className"
    :novalidate="noValidate"
    @submit="handleSubmit"
    @reset="handleReset"
  >
    <slot v-bind="formState" />
  </form>
</template>
